message:
test: add Hero, LanguageSwitcher, AnimatedSection, WorkflowBuilder tests

41 new tests covering Hero (headline, stats, search debounce,
category pills, form submit), LanguageSwitcher (locale display,
navigation path construction), AnimatedSection/AnimatedItem
(children rendering, reduced motion, stagger mode), and
WorkflowBuilder (empty state, add/remove steps, search, export copy).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
